title: luban-homebrew
subtitle: A third-party Homebrew tap for Linglong CLI tools — tap once, brew install, brew upgrade.

native.title: Homebrew native
native.description: Formulae install like homebrew-core — same tap, install, and upgrade workflow.

script.title: One-line install.js
script.description: curl the hosted script; it checks for brew and installs the default formula.

formulas.title: Available formulae
formulas.description: Every package in Formula/ with install commands and upstream links.

usage.title: How to use
usage.description: Direct install, tap-first workflow, Brewfile, and upgrade paths.

install.title: Other install methods
install.hint: Paste in Terminal. Requires Homebrew on macOS or Linux.
install.methodsIntro: Prefer brew commands? Use one of these instead of install.js.
install.tap:
brew tap systembugtj/luban-homebrew
brew install --HEAD gopdf
